content: pyca/cryptography latest stable is 49.0.0 (June 2026), dev branch 50.0.0-dev1. Provides Fernet (cryptography.fernet.Fernet) for authenticated symmetric encryption and Scrypt KDF (cryptography.hazmat.primitives.kdf.scrypt.Scrypt) for passphrase-derived keys. This is the standard, audited choice for the keystore.
